loop.player_action: Use Last Post hub objects or NPCs to accept a quest or contract.
loop.feedback: Quest journal shows the current objective, reward, and linked location.

loop.player_action: Equip basic gear, recover, or buy a small upgrade before leaving.
loop.feedback: Stats and blocked/ready states show whether the seeker can pass the gate or attempt the contract.

loop.player_action: Open the Ash Border map and choose an unlocked quest node.
loop.feedback: The selected node shows threat, quest link, and travel/start action.
HP, damage ticks, enemy state, and win/loss result are readable without active skills.

loop.player_action: Collect loot, contract progress, or a strange clue.
loop.feedback: Gold, XP, item, quest state, and clue journal updates appear immediately.

loop.player_action: Return to Last Post to report, recover, upgrade, or follow the next clue.
loop.feedback: Hub state, NPC reactions, and journal/map unlocks show what changed.
